---
title: "Articles"
date: 2026-02-01
date-modified: 2026-02-01
---

* [An AI agent published a hit piece on me](https://theshamblog.com/an-ai-agent-published-a-hit-piece-on-me/)
* [Why academics stink at writing](https://www.chronicle.com/article/why-academics-stink-at-writing/)
* [Zombie nouns](https://archive.nytimes.com/opinionator.blogs.nytimes.com/2012/07/23/zombie-nouns/)
* [The preprint revolution](https://upstream.force11.org/the-preprint-revolution-implications-for-bibliographic-databases/)
* [Runescape helps Venezuelans survive](https://www.polygon.com/features/2020/5/27/21265613/runescape-is-helping-venezuelans-survive)
* [The False Promise of ChatGPT](https://www.nytimes.com/2023/03/08/opinion/noam-chomsky-chatgpt-ai.html)
